app_subtitle: أنشئ ملفات MP3 للدورات والبودكاست والكتب الصوتية باستخدام أصوات محلية أو سحابية.
about_text:
LocalText2Voice
AI Voice & Audio Production
By Esteban, AndromedaNova.com
no_updates_message: You already have the latest version ({version}).
update_verified_message: The update was downloaded and its SHA-256 checksum was verified.
install_update_prompt: Install it now? LocalText2Voice will close before the installer opens.
remote_audio_sources_help: These links open in your browser. Review the license of each download before publishing it; free does not always mean attribution-free or commercial use.
remote_music_pixabay_description: 260,000+ royalty-free music tracks. The Pixabay Content License generally allows use without attribution, subject to its prohibited uses.
remote_music_mixkit_description: Free stock music organized by genre and mood under the Mixkit Stock Music Free License.
remote_music_fma_description: Original music under Creative Commons, public-domain or custom licenses. Check the license shown on every track.
remote_music_incompetech_description: Kevin MacLeod's royalty-free catalog. Free Creative Commons use requires visible attribution; a paid license is available when credit is not possible.
remote_music_youtube_description: Royalty-free production music in YouTube Studio. A Google sign-in is required and some Creative Commons tracks require attribution.
remote_sfx_pixabay_description: 120,000+ free sound-effect tracks under the Pixabay Content License, generally without required attribution.
remote_sfx_mixkit_description: Free MP3 and WAV effects for personal and commercial projects, with no sign-up or attribution required.
remote_sfx_freesound_description: A large community library of recordings, ambiences, loops and samples. Each sound has its own CC0, CC BY or CC BY-NC license, so check attribution and commercial-use terms.
remote_sfx_zapsplat_description: 160,000+ effects. The free Basic account provides MP3 downloads and requires attribution; Premium removes that requirement.
remote_sfx_youtube_description: Downloadable MP3 sound effects inside YouTube Studio, searchable by category and duration. Google sign-in required.
advanced_render_stale_prompt: Have there been changes, do you want to render again?
select_fx_event: Select an FX event to edit.
project_parent_folder_prompt: Choose where to create the project folder
project_folder_exists_message: The selected project folder is not empty. Use it anyway?
no_projects_found: No saved projects were found yet.
unsaved_project_message: Save changes to the current project before continuing?
mix_preview_no_audio: Generate or open an audiobook before previewing the mix.
generation_page_subtitle: Paste long-form text, choose a voice, and generate clean MP3 narration.
settings_page_subtitle: Configure engines, output, podcast mixing, and advanced generation options.
audio_mix_preview_subtitle: Mix your voice narration with background music.
text_placeholder: الصق هنا فصلاً أو درساً أو مقالاً أو دورة كاملة...
voice_help: يتم اكتشاف الأصوات من voices/**/*.onnx عند وجود ملف .onnx.json المطابق.
voice_manager_description: تصفح مستودع rhasspy/piper-voices العام. تُنزّل النماذج مباشرة إلى مجلد الأصوات المحمول. قد تختلف التراخيص؛ راجع معلومات المستودع قبل إعادة التوزيع.
remove_voice_confirm: هل تريد إزالة {voice} من هذا الكمبيوتر؟
adaptive_pause: تكييف التوقف حسب طول الفقرة وإيقاع القراءة
mix_preview_waiting: Generate audio to inspect the voice and music mix here.
mix_preview_ready: Move the volume sliders to check whether music competes with the voice.
voices_found: تم العثور على {count} صوت Piper صالح.
no_voices: لم يتم العثور على أصوات Piper صالحة
missing_voice_message: أضف نموذج Piper بصيغة .onnx وملف .onnx.json الخاص به إلى مجلد voices.
close_running_message: هل تريد إلغاء الإنشاء الحالي وإغلاق التطبيق؟
still_stopping_message: ما زالت عملية الصوت قيد الإيقاف. انتظر قليلاً ثم أغلق التطبيق مرة أخرى.
piper_engine_help: Free and offline. Uses local .onnx voices from the voices folder.
api_key_local_note: API keys are stored locally in config.json. Leave API engines empty unless you want to use that provider.
api_voice_config_help: This engine uses the voice and credentials configured in Settings > TTS Engines.
openai_instructions_placeholder: Optional: calm narrator, energetic course teacher...
elevenlabs_voice_id_placeholder: Paste a voice_id from your ElevenLabs account
gemini_prompt_placeholder: Optional: Say this as a warm podcast narrator.
gemini_help: Remote Gemini TTS via Google AI Studio API key. Output is wrapped as WAV so it can use the same MP3 pipeline.
detecting_gpu: جار اكتشاف GPU ووقت تشغيل CUDA...
voice_clone_consent: لدي إذن لاستخدام هذا الصوت المرجعي.
chatterbox_help: محرك محلي متقدم. يستخدم Auto CUDA عند توفره ويعود إلى CPU على الأجهزة العادية. يوصى بـ CUDA/NVIDIA للسرعة لكنه ليس ضروريا.
chatterbox_runtime_missing: Chatterbox Python dependencies are not installed yet. Open Settings > TTS Engines and click Install.
reference_audio_missing: لم يتم العثور على ملف الصوت المرجعي: {path}
voice_clone_consent_required: أكد أن لديك إذنا لاستخدام الصوت المرجعي.
chatterbox_turbo_reference_required: يتطلب Chatterbox Turbo ملفا صوتيا مرجعيا مدته 5-20 ثانية.
tts_models_intro: Choose the voice generation engine here. Local engines can be installed or removed on demand; API engines only need their credentials below.
load_into_memory_help: Chatterbox loads once at the start of a generation job and stays in memory while blocks are rendered.
qwen_instruct_placeholder: Optional style: calm narrator, warm course voice...
qwen_help: Advanced local neural TTS. The app downloads Qwen3 TTS on demand into the local data folder and uses CUDA automatically when the embedded runtime can see an NVIDIA GPU.
qwen_runtime_missing: Qwen3 TTS is not installed yet. Open Settings > TTS Engines and click Install.
qwen_load_into_memory_help: Qwen3 TTS loads once at the start of a generation job and stays in memory while blocks are rendered.
omnivoice_instruct_placeholder: Example: female, young adult, moderate pitch
omnivoice_reference_text_placeholder: Optional transcript for the reference audio.
omnivoice_help: OmniVoice is a multilingual local TTS engine. LocalText2Voice uses it in voice cloning mode with a reference voice from the voice gallery.
omnivoice_runtime_missing: OmniVoice is not installed yet. Open Settings > TTS Engines and click Install.
omnivoice_reference_required: OmniVoice voice cloning requires a reference audio file.
omnivoice_voices_page_help: OmniVoice uses gallery voices as cloning references. Selecting a voice downloads its preview/reference audio when needed.
review_library_help: Review generated segments, similarity scores, and transcripts.
review_page_subtitle: Inspect each generated segment and compare the transcript with the original text.
review_auto: Automatically review generated segments after generation
review_retries_layers_help: Automatic retries run when either enabled review layer does not pass. Each retry regenerates a candidate, transcribes it with Whisper, checks its audio tail, and keeps the best combined result.
review_tail_enable: Detect unexplained audio after the last valid word
review_tail_autocut: Automatically trim excessive tails and re-review with Whisper
review_tail_help: Whisper timestamps are aligned with the source text so trailing hallucinated syllables are ignored. The thresholds measure the remaining tail after the safety margin. Tail risk is a transparent severity estimate, not a model probability. Auto-cut removes only the part beyond the possible-artifact threshold, then sends the trimmed candidate back to Whisper and keeps it only if it reviews better. Generation Review also provides exact waveform and quick tail-cut tools.
review_tail_waveform_help: Click or drag the white line to seek. Listen around the end of the spoken text, place the line after the final valid sound, then choose Cut Here. Whisper will review the trimmed clip again.
review_tail_invalid_cut: Choose a point inside the audio clip.
review_tail_waveform_failed: Could not load the segment waveform: {message}
review_tail_cut_unavailable: Whisper did not provide a reliable last-word timestamp for this segment. Use Waveform & Cut to choose the point manually.
review_tail_cut_confirm: Segment {index} will end at {position:.2f} s, removing {removed:.2f} s. The trimmed WAV will replace this segment and Whisper will review it again. Continue?
review_tail_cutting: Cutting the audio tail for segment {index}...
review_tail_cut_complete: Audio tail removed. Starting Whisper review...
review_help: Faster Whisper small is downloaded on demand and used to transcribe generated segment WAV files for similarity scoring.
review_retries_help: Automatic retries only run for segments below the threshold. Each retry regenerates a candidate, transcribes it with Whisper, scores it, and keeps the best-scoring audio in the database.
review_rebuild_clean_tooltip: Rebuild the audiobook from current segment audio files.
review_select_segment: Select a segment to inspect the full original and transcript.
review_edit_segment_help: Edit the original text for this segment. Regenerate it afterwards.
review_source_edit_hint: You can edit this text here, then save and regenerate the segment.
review_candidate_ready: Candidate generated. Listen to it, then approve or discard it.
whisper_status: Faster Whisper status: {status}. Runtime: {runtime}. Model cache: {path}
custom_engine_response_pcm: HTTP response is raw PCM 16-bit mono
custom_engine_response_json_path: JSON field contains local audio file path
custom_engine_help: Custom engines call an HTTP endpoint that returns WAV/PCM audio or JSON containing audio. Use placeholders like {{text}}, {{voice}}, {{language}}, {{speed}}, {{api_key}}, and {{output_path}}.
custom_engine_template_help: Templates can use {{text}}, {{voice}}, {{language}}, {{speed}}, {{model}}, {{api_key}}, and {{output_path}}. For JSON responses, use dot paths like audio.data or result.file.
custom_engine_invalid_message: Custom engines require at least a name and an endpoint URL.
whisper_missing_message: Faster Whisper is not installed. Generation Review needs it to transcribe segment audio, compare it with the source text, and mark segments that need attention.
search_voices_descriptions_tags: Search voices, descriptions, styles or tags...
omnivoice_design_subtitle: أنشئ صوتًا مرجعيًا اصطناعيًا باستخدام المعلمات التي يدعمها OmniVoice فقط.
name: الاسم
omnivoice_design_help: OmniVoice accepts one value per category: gender, age, pitch, optional whisper, and optional English accent.
omnivoice_design_sample_text: The sun dipped below the horizon, painting the sky in shades of gold and violet as the quiet village came to life.
omnivoice_design_status_ready: Choose parameters and generate a preview.
omnivoice_design_missing_sample: Add sample text before generating a preview.
omnivoice_design_preview_ready: Preview ready. Listen, then save it as a reusable voice.
omnivoice_design_generate_before_save: Generate a preview before saving the designed voice.
temporary_audio_cache_help: يتم الاحتفاظ بملفات WAV للمقاطع للمراجعة وإعادة التوليد. يمكنك حذفها بعد المزج النهائي لتوفير مساحة.
auto_delete_segment_wavs_after_mix: حذف ذاكرة WAV للمقاطع بعد إنشاء المزج الكامل
wav_cache_stats: المشروع الحالي: {current_count} WAV، {current_size}. كل المشاريع: {all_count} WAV، {all_size}. مؤقت مهمل: {temp_count} ملف، {temp_size}.
no_current_project: لم يتم العثور على مشروع حالي.
cleanup_current_wavs_confirm: هل تريد حذف ملفات WAV للمقاطع في المشروع الحالي؟ لن يتم حذف ملفات MP3 النهائية.
cleanup_all_wavs_confirm: هل تريد حذف ملفات WAV للمقاطع في كل المشاريع؟ لن يتم حذف ملفات MP3 النهائية.
cleanup_wavs_busy: انتظر حتى تنتهي عملية التوليد أو المراجعة قبل حذف ملفات WAV.
cleanup_wavs_none: لم يتم العثور على ملفات WAV للمقاطع.
cleanup_temp_audio_confirm: هل تريد حذف مجلدات الصوت المؤقتة المهملة الخاصة بـ LocalText2Voice؟ لن يتم حذف ملفات MP3 النهائية أو ملفات المشروع.
auto_cleanup_wavs_done: أزال التنظيف التلقائي {count} ملف WAV، وحرر {size}.
mix_preview_outdated: تم إنشاء المعاينة، لكن الإعدادات تغيرت. اضغط تشغيل مرة أخرى لتحديثها.
normalize_clean_audio_help: يستخدم FFmpeg لتطبيع مستوى الصوت (-16 LUFS) عند ترميز ملف MP3 للنص الصوتي النظيف. يساعد على جعل المقاطع أكثر اتساقًا في مستوى الصوت المدرك، لكنه ليس ضاغطًا احترافيًا كاملًا.
text_splitting_help: يتم تطبيق التقسيم الافتراضي على كل المحركات ما لم يتم تحديد قيمة خاصة لمحرك معين.
installer_gpu_setup_message: تم اختيار ملف GPU أثناء التثبيت. سيقوم LocalText2Voice بتنزيل وتجهيز OmniVoice و Faster Whisper. قد يستغرق ذلك عدة دقائق ويتطلب اتصالاً بالإنترنت.
installer_setup_message: سيقوم LocalText2Voice الآن بتجهيز المكونات الاختيارية المحددة.
installer_setup_complete: المكونات الاختيارية جاهزة. يمكنك البدء في إنشاء الكتب الصوتية.
desktop_mcp_intro: Use this stdio MCP configuration for Claude Desktop and other desktop clients that launch local MCP servers.
codex_mcp_help: الصق هذا المقطع أو ادمجه في ~/.codex/config.toml، ثم أعد تشغيل Codex أو ChatGPT Desktop. يتم إنشاء المسارات وفق مستخدم Windows الحالي وموقع التثبيت.
codex_toml_copied: تم نسخ إعداد MCP الخاص بـ Codex.
moving_generation_to_shared_host: يستخدم التوليد مضيف المحرك المشترك؛ سيتم تحرير نسخة {engine} القديمة المحملة داخل الواجهة.
claude_mcp_help: Paste or merge this block into %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json, then restart Claude Desktop. Use Developer settings or Connectors in Claude to confirm that LocalText2Voice tools are loaded.
chatgpt_mcp_help: ChatGPT currently documents MCP Apps/Developer mode through reachable HTTP MCP servers. Keep using this stdio bridge for Claude-style desktop clients; the HTTP server below is the better future path for ChatGPT remote/app use.
local_server_intro: Optional advanced server for HTTP clients or future remote workflows. For Claude Desktop, prefer the stdio configuration above.
local_server_allow_lan_tip: Keep this off unless you need another device on your network to connect.
no_token_to_copy: There is no access token to copy yet.
local_server_one_job_tip: Heavy TTS models are safest with one generation job at a time.
local_server_http_help: HTTP endpoints: GET /health, GET /voices, GET /background-music, POST /jobs, GET /jobs/{job_id}, POST /jobs/{job_id}/cancel.
local_server_token_hint: Use the access token as a Bearer token, or as ?token=... for file URLs.
local_server_no_token_hint: No token is configured. This is acceptable only for localhost experiments.
clip_not_resolved: This clip is not resolved yet. Run Whisper review first.
clip_outside_fast_preview: This clip is outside the fast first-minute preview.
play_requires_whisper: PLAY requires word-level Whisper timestamps. Install Faster Whisper from Settings > Review before generating this project.
close_shared_engine_no_models: No TTS model is currently reported as loaded.
close_shared_engine_message: {loaded}\n\nClose the shared server and release its memory, or keep it running for MCP clients?
audio_libraries_help: Manage background music and sound effects used by podcast mixes and PLAY markup.
delete_sfx_confirm: Delete {name} from the sound effects library?
audio_library_folders_help: Relative paths are resolved from the application folder. PLAY searches both folders recursively when only a filename is given.
advanced_mix_help: Inspect the synchronized buses, PLAY events and their exact positions on the narration timeline.
engine_install_intro: يقوم هذا المحرك بتنزيل تبعيات Python المعزولة الخاصة به ونموذج الذكاء الاصطناعي. قد يبدو التطبيق مشغولًا أثناء تنزيل الملفات الكبيرة وإعدادها.
engine_install_space_required: المساحة الحرة الموصى بها قبل التثبيت: {size} جيجابايت على الأقل.
engine_install_duration: الوقت التقديري: {duration}. قد يستغرق وقتًا أطول حسب اتصال الإنترنت والجهاز وسرعة وحدة التخزين.
engine_install_not_enough_space: لا توجد مساحة حرة كافية للبدء بأمان. حرّر بعض مساحة القرص ثم افتح نافذة التثبيت هذه مرة أخرى.
engine_install_do_not_close: مهم: لا تغلق LocalText2Voice ولا توقف تشغيل الكمبيوتر أثناء التثبيت.
engine_install_close_blocked: لا يزال التثبيت قيد التشغيل. استخدم إلغاء التثبيت وانتظر حتى يتوقف بأمان.
engine_install_finished_safe: توقفت عملية التثبيت. يمكنك الآن إغلاق هذه النافذة بأمان.
engine_install_running_close_message: لا تغلق LocalText2Voice أثناء تثبيت محرك TTS. ألغِ التثبيت من نافذة التقدم وانتظر حتى يتوقف بأمان.
reset_settings_description: يعيد تفضيلات التطبيق إلى القيم الافتراضية الآمنة. لن يتم حذف النماذج أو الأصوات أو المشاريع أو الموسيقى أو الملفات الصوتية التي تم إنشاؤها.
reset_settings_confirm_message: ستتم إعادة ضبط جميع التفضيلات واختيارات المحركات ومفاتيح API المحفوظة. لن يتم حذف النماذج أو الأصوات أو المشاريع أو الموسيقى أو الملفات الصوتية التي تم إنشاؤها. هل تريد المتابعة؟
text_normalization_description: Expand abbreviations, numbers, quantities, and language-specific forms before text is sent to the TTS engine. The source text in the editor is not changed.
normalization_auto_help: Auto uses the language reported by the selected voice. You can edit every starter dictionary or create and import one for another language.
normalization_reset_confirm_message: All edits, disabled entries, and custom entries in {name} ({language}) will be replaced with the starter defaults. Continue?
normalization_reset_done_message: The English dictionary was restored to its default entries.
normalized_text_placeholder: The normalized preview will appear here.
normalization_preview_stale: Preview pending. Normalize to review the spoken text.
normalization_preview_ready: Preview updated. This is the text that will be prepared for speech.
normalization_preview_no_dictionary: No dictionary matches the selected voice language. The original text is shown unchanged.
normalization_create_help: Use a language or locale code such as nl, ko, pt-br, or en-gb. The new dictionary starts empty and can be edited here or populated by importing JSON.
normalization_delete_dictionary_confirm: Delete {name} ({language}) and all of its entries? This cannot be undone.
normalization_import_mode_message: {name} ({language}) already exists. Merge updates matching entries and keeps the rest. Replace removes all current entries first.
normalization_number_rules_available: Automatic rules are available for numbers, decimals, percentages, currencies, measurements, dates, Roman numerals, and common ordinal forms. These rules are separate from the editable dictionary.
normalization_number_rules_unavailable: Dictionary replacements and measurement units are available. Automatic number and ordinal expansion is not yet available for this language.
normalization_json_help: JSON workflow: export any dictionary as a template, edit its entries in an external editor (or with an AI assistant), then import it and choose Merge or Replace.
normalization_enable_rules_help: Turn all number, date, quantity, and Roman numeral rules on or off. Dictionary replacements remain active.
normalization_rules_dialog_help: Choose which structured values are converted before TTS. Turning a rule off preserves that value exactly, even when the general number rule remains on.
engine_repair_intro: Existing model files were detected. They will be reused, and only missing or updated runtime/model files will be downloaded. You can also run this again later to repair or update the engine.
